code_value:
W: Hey Leo, are you all set for our trip to the new Indoor Climbing Centre later?

M: Almost Amy, but I don't remember the rules well. Can you tell me?

W: No problem. First, we have to check in at the main gate as soon as we get there.

M: Right, I remember that. What about the things we need to wear for safety?

W: We have to keep hard hats on the whole time, and wear the right climbing shoes too.

M: Got it. Are there any important things we shouldn't do while climbing?

W: Sure. Never climb without a rope, and don't use personal music players or phones while climbing.

M: Thanks for telling me! I'll follow the rules so we can have a safe, fun time.

ets_th1 What do they have to keep on the whole time?
(Glasses. / Hard hats. / Coats.)
ets_th2 What are the two things they are not allowed to do?
(Eat food or drink water. / Talk to others or take photos. / Climb without a rope or use phones or music players.)
